task_completion.description: Verify the agent has located and selected the Green Valley Water Facility in CAMEO Data Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager interface should be visible with 'Green Valley Water Facility' selected, highlighted, or opened in the facility list.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has initiated the generation of a Responder Summary report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A report generation menu, dialog, or screen within CAMEO Data Manager showing 'Responder Summary' selected as the report type.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes facility details, emergency contacts, and storage locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes, configuration settings, or a report preview showing sections for facility details, emergency contacts, and storage locations are included in the report.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes chemical inventory information for Chlorine and Fluorosilic Acid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report preview, chemical selection dialog, or final generated document explicitly lists 'Chlorine' and 'Fluorosilic Acid' in the inventory section.

task_completion.description: Verify the generated report is exported and saved to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\' with the report file being saved, or a File Explorer window showing the generated report file located in that exact directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the CAMEO Data Manager graphical interface to generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window should be visible in the screenshots, showing genuine interaction rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the report was exported using the application's built-in export/save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a standard OS 'Save As' dialog or a CAMEO-specific export confirmation window, rather than a text editor being used to manually create a file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not manually type the expected report contents into a blank document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should appear in a standard generated format (e.g., PDF preview, CAMEO print layout) and not as raw text manually typed into Notepad, Wordpad, or a similar text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Facility Name: Green Valley Water Facility. Address: 123 First Avenue, Colchester, VT. Chemicals to include: Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) and Fluorosilic Acid (CAS 16961-83-4). Emergency Contact Phone: 802-111-1111. Target Export Directory: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\
